calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jacqueline Yu for Winnifred Homer-Smith.

Ms. Yu stated that they spoke with Lawrence Siracusa from the Witherspoon and Siracusa Law Firm and that he could not find the second duplicate will, and that Mr. Siracusa stated that he spoke to Mr. Witherspoon and that Mr. Witherspoon does not have it either. The Court dispensed with notice to Luv Denise Savard (order for the same signed in open court). The Court stated that it was satisfied with the evidence presented and granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Ms. Yu will submit a proposed order dispensing with notice to David Torres as requested in the petition.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
